user.title: Swiggy login
user.description: Paste the Swiggy auth cookies JSON exported from the cookie-extractor app.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Swiggy
reauth_confirm.description: Your Swiggy session has expired. Paste a fresh cookies JSON.

error.invalid_cookies: Cookies JSON did not match the expected schema.

abort.already_configured: This Swiggy account is already configured.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force an immediate refresh of the Swiggy order data.
